name: 501 Original Fit Men's Jeans
description: The blueprint for every pair of jeans in existence. The 501 Original features a classic straight leg and iconic styling introduced in 1873, with patented durable rivets, five-pocket styling, and a signature button fly. Medium stonewash finish that softens beautifully with wear.
search_query: levis 501 original fit jeans medium wash

name: 511 Slim Fit Men's Jeans
description: The 511 Slim sits below the waist and fits slim from the hip to ankle, for a fit that moves with your body. Cut close to the body — lean, but not too skinny. The perfect alternative to the skinny jean, made with a hint of stretch for all-day comfort.
search_query: levis 511 slim fit jeans light wash

name: Cowboy Cut Original Fit Jean
description: The 13MWZ has been a tried-and-true wardrobe staple for cowboys for more than 70 years and is the official ProRodeo competition jean. Features a classic neolite patch, fully felled side seams, five-pocket styling, and signature W stitching. Made from 100% heavyweight cotton denim.
search_query: wrangler cowboy cut original fit 13MWZ jeans

name: Extreme Motion Regular Fit Straight Leg Jean
description: Features an Extreme Flex Waistband that adapts to every movement, along with authentic five-pocket styling. Extreme Motion denim technology offers four-way stretch for maximum comfort and freedom of movement. Regular fit with a straight leg built for everyday wear.

name: Slim Jeans

name: Straight Jeans
